title: Motorcycle Mechanics
description: Diagnose, adjust, repair, or overhaul motorcycles, scooters, mopeds, dirt bikes, or similar motorized vehicles.

tasks.text: Mount, balance, change, or check condition or pressure of tires.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Replace defective parts, using hand tools, arbor presses, flexible power presses, or power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dismantle engines and repair or replace defective parts, such as magnetos, carburetors, or generators.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Connect test panels to engines and measure generator output, ignition timing, or other engine performance indicators.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Listen to engines, examine vehicle frames, or confer with customers to determine nature and extent of malfunction or damage.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Repair or replace other parts, such as headlights, horns, handlebar controls, gasoline or oil tanks, starters, or mufflers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Disassemble subassembly units and examine condition, movement, or alignment of parts, visually or using gauges.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair or adjust motorcycle subassemblies, such as forks, transmissions, brakes, or drive chains, according to specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Reassemble frames and reinstall engines after repairs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Remove cylinder heads and grind valves to scrape off carbon and replace defective valves, pistons, cylinders, or rings, using hand and power tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Hammer out dents and bends in frames and weld tears and breaks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
